title: ilex subcaudata
intro: Ilex subcaudata, also known as the Chinese Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family native to southern China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ilex subcaudata include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, as well as its ability to help with weight management and improve liver function. Herbal preparations of Ilex subcaudata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
